updates.title: Tech Library PDFs Synced
updates.summary: Two OpenAI Library Tech deck PDFs were merged into Career Deck with PDF-derived fit, priorities, timing caveats, compensation where present, and no fabricated apply links.
items: Imported July 1 revised new/changed tech opportunities including Claude Corps, OpenAI Campus Network, Microsoft Copilot Student Ambassador, Notion Campus Leaders, and AI hackathons.
Imported July 2 prior-monitor catchup highlights including Cloudflare, Google Student Researcher, Scale AI, SharkNinja, Whitney Museum, Zipline, Great Question, Notion, Postman, YC, and CAIS.
Added Tech report summary buckets, Apply priority, and fitness signals to match the Game opportunity page.
Kept missing direct apply URLs as # and labeled uncertain timing/rolling postings through confidence and review flags instead of pretending direct verification.

updates.title: Game Library Report Synced
updates.summary: OpenAI Library game internship report for July 1 was merged into Career Deck with verified, carried-forward, closed, and stale leads labeled separately.
items: Added 7 newly verified or newly re-verified game internship and operations roles.
Carried forward 6 still-open or adjacent roles with review notes where location, portfolio, or eligibility was uncertain.
Marked 4 no-longer-actionable leads as closed instead of presenting them as open opportunities.
Added stale or aggregator-only leads as changed records with low confidence and needsReview=true.

updates.title: Tech Section Synced
updates.summary: The first shared ChatGPT conversation was converted into Career Deck website records with uncertain fields shown as TBD.
items: Imported Claude Corps, Apple undergraduate internships, Microsoft student programs, MLH programs, AI hackathons, and company career role links.
Marked unknown deadlines, compensation, eligibility, and role titles as TBD instead of fabricating fields.
Flagged BeBee and Jobright as aggregator-only records pending official employer verification.
Kept LinkedIn and X as blocked sources because login, platform restrictions, and anti-bot protections prevent compliant scraping.

updates.title: Game Section Synced
updates.summary: The game-industry shared ChatGPT conversation was synced into a separate Game section with studio career pages, internships, co-ops, early-career programs, and aggregator-only leads marked for review.
items: Added game-studio sources including Riot Games, Activision, Blizzard, Epic Games, EA, Ubisoft, PlayStation, 2K, King, Zynga, Scopely, Tencent, Garena, Paper Games, InFold Games, NetEase, Kabam, and Razer.
Separated official studio career pages from aggregator links such as GameJobs, BuiltIn, LinkedIn, BeBee, ZipRecruiter, and ShowbizJobs.
Preserved role titles that were visible in the shared conversation URL paths, but kept deadlines, compensation, eligibility, and locations as TBD unless the chat source clearly exposed them.
Kept source links attached so each game record can be verified against the official page directly.
